title: Complete and optimise DRIFTER — merge vivi branch, ship voice HUD, quality sweep
description: Full sweep: commit in-progress voice-routing/HUD-feedback work, merge the diverged feature branch (vivi assistant + Flipper Zero + UI overhaul + production readiness), ensure tests pass, run quality pass, deploy to /opt/drifter.

stories.title: Commit WIP voice routing + HUD feedback
acceptanceCriteria: git status shows zero modified tracked files after commit
Commit message describes voice routing + HUD mic dot + AI overlay feature
src/config.py contains TOPICS['voice_status'] and TOPICS['hud_navigate']
src/voice_alerts.py calls _pub_voice_status('speaking') before TTS playback and _pub_voice_status('idle') in finally block
src/voice_input.py contains _classify_voice() and route_transcript() functions
src/screen_dash.html contains mic-dot element and ai-overlay element
pytest passes (239+ tests, 0 failures)

stories.title: Merge diverged branch (vivi + Flipper Zero + UI overhaul) into HEAD
acceptanceCriteria: git merge completes with no unresolved conflicts
src/vivi.py exists in working tree
services/drifter-vivi.service exists in working tree
config/vivi.yaml exists in working tree
src/flipper_bridge.py exists in working tree
services/drifter-flipper.service exists in working tree
git log shows both HEAD and fe85275 as ancestors
pytest passes after merge (0 failures)

stories.title: Wire voice_input route_transcript end-to-end and add/fix tests
acceptanceCriteria: voice_input.py route_transcript() publishes to TOPICS['hud_navigate'] for navigation intents
voice_input.py route_transcript() forwards query intent to LLM mechanic topic
tests/test_voice_input.py covers _classify_voice() with nav and query cases
tests/test_vivi.py exists and passes (covers vivi module initialization and response flow)
pytest passes (0 failures, no skips on core logic)

stories.title: Quality pass and deploy to /opt/drifter
acceptanceCriteria: ai-slop-cleaner run completes on all files changed in this Ralph session
pytest passes after deslop (0 failures)
sudo deploy to /opt/drifter completes (all src/*.py + assets copied, chowned to drifter)
drifter diagnose exits 0 (or only warns on missing USB hardware)
curl http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz returns 200 or meaningful response
